achievements.title: Think You're Mr. Big Shot?
achievements.description: In Big Shot, clear one side and score the 8-ball. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: I'm Just A Little Tee'd Off
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, complete 3 of the 5 rounds. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Aces Are High But The Stakes Are Low
achievements.description: In Ace High, win 4 or more credits. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Poker Tilt-A-Whirl
achievements.description: Complete the Table Goal for Play Boy.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Aim For Victory, Land Amongst The Cars
achievements.description: In Victory, finish the race. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Now With Slightly Less Armed Robbery
achievements.description: In Central Park, win 5 or more credits. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: I Dream Of Pinball
achievements.description: Complete the Table Goal for Genie. (Table Goal status "Complete" MUST be earned in Arcade, not Gottlieb Challenge.)
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: There Is An Inexorable Force In The Cosmos
achievements.description: In Black Hole, survive re-entry. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Mysterious Cities of Pinball
achievements.description: In El Dorado, earn the special. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Little Squirrels In White Coats
achievements.description: In Goin' Nuts, re-launch 3 ball mode. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Bowling Pinball At An Arcade Inside A Bowling Alley
achievements.description: In Strikes N' Spares, bowl a 300 regulation game. [Table Goal status is ignored.]
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Black Jack Sparrow
achievements.description: Complete the Table Goal for Payout Mode.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Pinball Lizard
achievements.description: End Gottlieb Challenge with 10 or more Table Score, by Game Over or Game Complete.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Tommy Wannabe
achievements.description: End Gottlieb Challenge with 20 or more Table Score, by Game Over or Game Complete.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Drop Stopper
achievements.description: End Gottlieb Challenge with 30 or more Table Score, by Game Over or Game Complete.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Arcade Rat
achievements.description: End Gottlieb Challenge with 40 or more Table Score, by Game Over or Game Complete.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Flipper King
achievements.description: End Gottlieb Challenge with 90 or more Table Score, by Game Over or Game Complete.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Pinball Wizard
achievements.description: End Gottlieb Challenge with 100 or more Table Score, by Game Over or Game Complete.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gottlieb Challenge Complete
achievements.description: Finish Gottlieb Challenge with any score by ending Central Park with 300 points or more.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Big Shot - Ball Save
achievements.description: In Big Shot, open the Ball Save by entering the center 8-ball slot.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Big Shot - Solids
achievements.description: In Big Shot, hit all Solids drop-targets on the left side in one ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Big Shot - Stripes
achievements.description: In Big Shot, hit all Stripes drop-targets on the right side in one ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Big Shot - Big Money
achievements.description: In Big Shot, get at least 50,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Big Shot - Street Cred
achievements.description: In Big Shot, earn at least 2 credits from any activities.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quest - Big Shot - Ball Savior
achievements.description: In Big Shot, properly use the Ball Save that you have opened.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Big Shot - Greedy
achievements.description: In Big Shot, hit all Solids and Stripes in one ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Big Shot - Center Special
achievements.description: In Big Shot, get the Special by hitting the lit-target in the center.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Big Shot - Bigger Money
achievements.description: In Big Shot, get at least 80,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Big Shot - Pinball Pool Shark
achievements.description: In Big Shot, get earn at least 4 credits from any activities.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Tee'd Off - Cheater
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, complete a Cheat Shot

achievements.title: Quests - Tee'd Off - I'm Down Here!
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, complete Find the Gopher mode
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Quests - Tee'd Off - Par-Tee Time! Excellent!
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, activate Go Fore Par-Tee mode
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Quests - Tee'd Off - Mulligan
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, earn an extra ball
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Quests - Tee'd Off - Par for the Course
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, clear 9 holes and start Multiball
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Teed Off - Anything Goes
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, activate Anything Goes mode
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Tee'd Off - That's Impressive
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, score a Super Jackpot
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Tee'd Off - Donkey Sized Score
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, score a Big Score
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Tee'd Off - Why Do I Feel Ripped Off?
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, double your score from a Skins Game
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Tee'd Off - High Score
achievements.description: In Tee'd Off, score a billion points
achievements.author: Gorgar

achievements.title: Quests - Ace High - Love Diamonds
achievements.description: In Ace High, light up the top two Jet Bumpers by lighting Diamond and Heart.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Ace High - Every Spade In The Club
achievements.description: In Ace High, light up the bottom two Jet Bumpers by lighting Spade and Club.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Ace High - Million Money Shot
achievements.description: In Ace High, gain 1 million points by falling into a lit hole.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Ace High - King Of Queens
achievements.description: In Ace High, earn any Special while all 3 Queen lights are lit.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Ace High - Ace Is The Place
achievements.description: In Ace High, earn any Special while any Ace light is lit.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Ace High - One Ball One Million
achievements.description: In Ace High, on the first ball, get 1,000,000 points without losing the ball.  (No 1-million slot.)
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Ace High - One 4 All
achievements.description: In Ace High, get at least 5,000,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Ace High - Ace Of The Based
achievements.description: In Ace High, earn 7 credits in one game.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Ace High - Three Holes, 1 Million
achievements.description: In Ace High, activate a lit 1-Million point slot 3 times in one game.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Ace High - Card Suite Special
achievements.description: In Ace High, earn any Special while all four card suite jet-bumpers are activated.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Play Boy - 1000 Karat Diamonds
achievements.description: In Play Boy, get at least 1000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Play Boy - No Balls Wasted
achievements.description: In Play Boy, finish a game without losing any ball(all 10 balls must be in a slot).
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Play Boy - Free-To-Play Boy
achievements.description: In Play Boy, collect either Free Play card from the board.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Play Boy - High Rolling
achievements.description: In Play Boy, collect a card worth 300 points or more.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Play Boy - All Boy No Play
achievements.description: In Play Boy, finish a game with exactly zero points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Play Boy - 3000 Karat Diamond
achievements.description: In Play Boy, get at least 3000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Play Boy - Joker's Wild
achievements.description: In Play Boy, collect the card worth 1000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Play Boy - All Play, No Boy
achievements.description: In Play Boy, collect both Free Play cards.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Play Boy - Portrait Photos
achievements.description: In Play Boy, finish having only collected cards with a value of 200 or more(Free Play OK).  (At least 5 cards.)
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Play Boy - Black Jack Practice For Later
achievements.description: In Play Boy, finish with exactly 2100 points.  (Not in Payout Mode.)
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Victory - Check Point Half
achievements.description: In Victory, reach at least Check Point 4 during a game.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Victory - Gamer FUEL
achievements.description: In Victory, spell FUEL in the correct order to shift the light from 50k to 100k.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Victory - 1 Million RPM
achievements.description: In Victory, receive an instant in-game reward of 1 million points or more.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Victory - You're Actually Not FINISHed
achievements.description: In Victory, collect the letters for FINISH to advance the Multiplier for the first time.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Victory - Making Good Mileage
achievements.description: In Victory, get at least 10,000,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Victory - Now You're Finished
achievements.description: In Victory, collect FINISH letters enough times to advance the Multiplier to 8x.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Victory - Pedal To The Metal
achievements.description: In Victory, earn an Extra Ball in any way you can.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Victory - Using Special FUEL
achievements.description: In Victory, get the Special from the Fuel Targets.

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Victory -Special Spinout
achievements.description: In Victory, get the Special from either Outlane.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Victory - Making Good Kilometerage
achievements.description: In Victory, get at least 20,000,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Central Park - Yellow And Green Bumper Make Zip Popper
achievements.description: In Central Park, light at least one yellow and one green pop bumpers at the same time.

achievements.title: Quests - Central Park - One Ball 500
achievements.description: In Central Park, get 500 points on the first ball.

achievements.title: Quests - Central Park - Yellow Thirty
achievements.description: In Central Park, advance the Yellow Target value to 30 points.

achievements.title: Quests - Central Park - Green Thirty
achievements.description: In Central Park, advance the Green Target value to 30 points.

achievements.title: Quests - Central Park - 10 Monkey Dings
achievements.description: In Central Park, get at least 1,000 points.

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Central Park - Yellow Fifty
achievements.description: In Central Park, advance the Yellow Target value to 50 points.

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Central Park - Green Fifty
achievements.description: In Central Park, advance the Green Target value to 50 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Central Park - Purse Snatcher
achievements.description: In Central Park, advance either Yellow or Green value to Special, then collect it.

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Central Park - One Ball Thousand
achievements.description: In Central Park, get 1000 points on the first ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Central Park - More Monkey Dings
achievements.description: In Central Park, get at least 1,500 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Genie - Iddy Biddy Living Space

achievements.title: Quests - Genie - Double Genie

achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Genie - Baller Djinn
achievements.description: In Genie, light up the Extra Ball lamp at the drain.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Genie - Wish Credits
achievements.description: In Genie, get at least 570,000 points to receive an extra credit.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quests - Genie - One Million Arabian Nights
achievements.description: In Genie, get at least 1,000,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Genie - My Three Wishes Is To Not Die
achievements.description: In Genie, light up the Extra Ball lamp three times without actually "losing" a ball. (Must LOSE Extra Ball in order to collect a new one.)

achievements.description: In Genie, earn the Special on the upper right portion of the table.

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Genie - We Are At Max Genie
achievements.description: In Genie, advance the Multiplier to 5x.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Genie - Phenomenal Bonus POWERRR
achievements.description: In Genie, advance the table bonus to the maximum 29,000 points 5 times on 1 ball.  (Do not 'bank' points before reaching 29k.)

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Genie - 1.75 Million Arabian Nights
achievements.description: In Genie, get at least 1,750,000 points.

achievements.description: In Black Hole, earn an extra ball from the captive hole

achievements.description: In Black Hole, collect the Special from the lower level

achievements.title: Wizard Quests - Black Hole - Dare to Master the Black Hole?
achievements.description: In Black Hole, score at least 250,000 from the lower level

achievements.description: In El Dorado, earn an extra ball

achievements.description: In El Dorado, score a 285,000+ point bonus

achievements.description: In El Dorado, score at least 1,000,000 points

achievements.description: In Goin' Nuts, score at least 1,000,000 points
